selected_solution_ids: 客户身份统一与数据集成方案
服务工单系统集成方案
私有化大模型部署方案
selection_criteria: Select only real solution_id values already present in the 63 case-local candidates.
Cover security or compliance prerequisites, integration dependencies, readiness requirements, unsupported boundaries, and case-study-friendly scenarios.
Avoid highly repetitive near-duplicate solution names so the public demo scope remains interpretable and auditable.
Use this file as the public synthetic demo scope, not as a substitute for a future enterprise master catalog.

selection_rationale_by_solution.合规政策RAG检索助手: Chosen to represent citation-heavy compliance retrieval with explicit human-review and policy-version prerequisites.
selection_rationale_by_solution.客户身份统一与数据集成方案: Chosen to represent master-data alignment and cross-system identity integration dependencies.
selection_rationale_by_solution.商品知识库RAG方案: Chosen to represent knowledge-governance and customer-readiness requirements for product content retrieval.
selection_rationale_by_solution.客服辅助回复方案: Chosen to represent assistive response workflows with clear unsupported automation boundaries.
selection_rationale_by_solution.服务工单系统集成方案: Chosen to represent workflow, field mapping, and service-system integration dependencies.
selection_rationale_by_solution.私有化大模型部署方案: Chosen to represent deployment isolation, security control, and infrastructure readiness constraints.

excluded_solution_ids: 企业数据治理咨询方案
售后流程梳理与数据治理咨询方案

项目结算数据质量检查
notes: The 63 source solution_id values come from Development Case inputs and remain case-local evaluation candidates.
This 6-solution subset defines the public synthetic demo scope for knowledge base and retrieval benchmark work in v1.2B.
Future enterprise master catalog work must be versioned separately and must not overwrite this v1 demo scope.
